'''mazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:sackwise|sackwise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-z-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sackwise|sackwise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:mazate|mazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mazatesher|mazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mazatesherĂ«m|mazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mazatero|mazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mazateshĂ«|mazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mazateshĂ«m|mazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimazatero|gokimazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimazateshĂ«|gokimazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimazateshĂ«m|gokimazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomazankerom|gomazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomazankeshĂ«|gomazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomazankeshĂ«m|gomazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomazankeya|gomazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mazaterom|mazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mazatemu|mazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mazateya|mazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimazaterom|gokimazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimazatemu|gokimazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimazateya|gokimazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:mazazate|mazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mazazatesher|mazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mazazatesherĂ«m|mazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mazazatero|mazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mazazateshĂ«|mazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mazazateshĂ«m|mazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimazazatero|gokimazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimazazateshĂ«|gokimazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimazazateshĂ«m|gokimazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomazazankerom|gomazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomazazankeshĂ«|gomazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomazazankeshĂ«m|gomazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomazazankeya|gomazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mazazaterom|mazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mazazatemu|mazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mazazateya|mazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimazazaterom|gokimazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimazazatemu|gokimazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimazazateya|gokimazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:mĂŠzĂŠte|mĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mĂŠzĂŠtesher|mĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|mĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠzĂŠtero|mĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|mĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|mĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠzĂŠtero|gokimĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokimĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokimĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomĂŠzĂŠnkerom|gomĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|gomĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gomĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomĂŠzĂŠnkeya|gomĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠzĂŠterom|mĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠzĂŠtemu|mĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mĂŠzĂŠteya|mĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠzĂŠterom|gokimĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokimĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimĂŠzĂŠteya|gokimĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:mafzafte|mafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mafzaftesher|mafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafzaftesherĂ«m|mafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafzaftero|mafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mafzafteshĂ«|mafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafzafteshĂ«m|mafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafzaftero|gokimafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimafzafteshĂ«|gokimafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafzafteshĂ«m|gokimafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomafzafnkerom|gomafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomafzafnkeshĂ«|gomafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafzafnkeshĂ«m|gomafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomafzafnkeya|gomafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafzafterom|mafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafzaftemu|mafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mafzafteya|mafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafzafterom|gokimafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafzaftemu|gokimafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimafzafteya|gokimafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
